items.content_html: WIP - This is a vim plugin that displays data in the status line for tidal cycles that can be installed with VimPlug. While it can run on it's own, this can be integrated with vim-airline.
items.title: winstonmyers/vim-tidal-statusline: WIP - This is a vim plugin that displays data in the status line for tidal cycles that can be installed with VimPlug.  While it can run on it's own, this can be integrated with vim-airline.

items.content_html: Vim9 plugin that adds a 'cut' operation separate from 'delete'
items.title: Coacher/vim9-cutlass: Vim9 plugin that adds a 'cut' operation separate from 'delete'

items.content_html: Graphical application for generating different color variations of Oomox (Numix-based) and Materia (ex-Flat-Plat) themes (GTK2, GTK3, Cinnamon, GNOME, Openbox, Xfwm), Archdroid, Gnome-Color, Numix, Papirus and Suru++ icon themes. Have a hack for HiDPI in gtk2. Its Base16 plugin also allowing a lot of app themes support like Alacritty, Emacs, GTK4, KDE, VIM and many more.
items.title: themix-project/themix-gui: Graphical application for generating different color variations of Oomox (Numix-based) and Materia (ex-Flat-Plat) themes (GTK2, GTK3, Cinnamon, GNOME, Openbox, Xfwm), Archdroid, Gnome-Color, Numix, Papirus and Suru++ icon themes. Have a hack for HiDPI in gtk2. Its Base16 plugin also allowing a lot of app themes support like Alacritty, Emacs, GTK4, KDE, VIM and many more.

items.content_html: This is a Vim text editor script ("plugin") that highlights nested ( ), [ ], and { } with different colors to aid readability. It is especially useful for *any* Lisp/Scheme family programming languages.
items.title: WraithGlade/WG-rainbow-vim: This is a Vim text editor script ("plugin") that highlights nested ( ), [ ], and { } with different colors to aid readability. It is especially useful for *any* Lisp/Scheme family programming languages.
